compiled_state.title: GREEN: Implement security_overlay detection in classifier
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Add security-sensitive pattern detection to review-complexity-classifier.sh and emit security_overlay boolean flag in JSON output.

### Implementation
1. Add is_security_sensitive() function that checks file paths against security patterns: */auth/*, */security/*, */crypto/*, */encryption/*, */session/*, */oauth/*
2. Add diff content scanning for security-sensitive imports/keywords in added lines
3. Compute SECURITY_OVERLAY variable (true if any scoring file matches security patterns OR diff content contains security imports)
4. Add both security_overlay and performance_overlay to all printf output statements (performance_overlay hardcoded to false initially)
5. Update empty-diff and all-exempt early-exit JSON to include both new fields

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/review-complexity-classifier.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests pass (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED: 0"
- [ ] security_overlay field present in classifier JSON output
  Verify: echo "diff --git a/src/auth/login.py b/src/auth/login.py" | bash plugins/dso/scripts/review-complexity-classifier.sh | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert 'security_overlay' in d"
- [ ] performance_overlay field present in JSON output (hardcoded false)
  Verify: echo "diff --git a/src/auth/login.py b/src/auth/login.py" | bash plugins/dso/scripts/review-complexity-classifier.sh | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert 'performance_overlay' in d"
- [ ] Auth paths trigger security_overlay=true
  Verify: printf 'diff --git a/src/auth/login.py b/src/auth/login.py\nindex 0..1 100644\n--- a/src/auth/login.py\n+++ b/src/auth/login.py\n@@ -1 +1 @@\n+x' | bash plugins/dso/scripts/review-complexity-classifier.sh | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d['security_overlay']==True"

comments.body: Fixed: GREEN implementation committed in a06e8c4e
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
